summary: Diff implements expanded backend UserProfile fields with migration, adds plan option enums and plan selection/payment recording, adds frontend plan utilities/hooks, updates authenticated nav to include Dashboard/Tools/My Account, and adds My Account form logic including DOB validation and newsletter opt-in mutation. However, legal/disclosure updates and the full expiration/grace-period auto-deletion lifecycle are not evidenced, and one plan option label does not match the requested exact wording.

missing_requirements.requirement: Plan dropdown shows all required options exactly with listed prices and 'No auto renewals' text for 6-month and yearly options.
missing_requirements.reason: One required option label does not match the requested wording exactly: Basic yearly is 'a year' rather than 'for a year'.

missing_requirements.requirement: On expiration date automatically downgrade to Free, and after expiration+7 days automatically delete the account and all associated user-owned data (e.g., journal entries, mood entries).
missing_requirements.reason: Frontend computes an effective Free plan when expired, but the diff does not show backend logic that (a) automatically downgrades stored plan/access on expiration and (b) deletes the user profile and associated data after the 1-week grace period. A frontend call to checkAndHandleExpirations exists, but the backend implementation is truncated/not evidenced and no journal/mood deletion is shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: My Account displays the exact newsletter question text "Would you like to join our Weekly Newsletter?" with Yes/No selection and persists to backend.
missing_requirements.reason: Newsletter persistence hook/mutation exists, but the diff snippet of MyAccountPage is truncated and does not show the exact required question text being rendered.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update in-app disclosure/legal content on My Account to include non-auto-renew language and the expiration/downgrade/grace-period/auto-deletion policy.
missing_requirements.reason: No changes/additions to a Legal & Policies/disclosure section are shown in the diff summary; MyAccountPage excerpt does not evidence the required legal text.

hallucinated_features.description: Plan-gated Tools page behavior that blocks tools until a plan is selected and gates features by effective plan level (e.g., reframing locked for Free).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest focuses on My Account fields, plan persistence, expiration lifecycle, newsletter opt-in, navigation, and legal disclosures; it does not request adding or changing Tools feature gating/locking UI.

hallucinated_features.description: Automatic navigation to My Account when no plan is selected.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; BuildRequest only requires navigation items exist and work, not forced navigation logic.
